name: induce_override_phase_b_item4_smoke
description: Smoke test for Phase B Item 4 (open-spot IP induce). TieredBot (hero) vs TrapBaitBot (checks flop OOP 70%, barrels turn/river). Two arms: rule OFF (ablated) and rule ON. Validates (a) TrapBaitBot behavior, (b) flop_check_then_barrel_rate convergence on the hero side, (c) the open-spot induce branch fires at least a handful of times.
hypothesis: TrapBaitBot's flop_check_then_barrel_rate converges above 0.55 within ~50 hands. The open-spot induce branch fires on at least a handful of hands per 500. EV impact at this sample size is not statistically meaningful — see INDUCE_OVERRIDE_HANDOFF.md 'Finding 3'.
